notes: Sprint 2B reproduction: Run Phase E3 (Ratio + kNN Smoothing) with identical parameters to Project 11. Sweeps uniform_fraction ∈ {0.2, 0.5, 0.8} and compares 1-NN vs 3-NN on mixed reference sets at N ∈ {1000, 1500}. Five stochastic seeds [111, 222, 333, 444, 555]. Outputs go to project_12/results/repro/phase_e3/.

validation_targets.acceptance_criteria: See FORMAL_CLAIMS.md P11-C05 (ratio optimality and 1-NN > 3-NN) section
